title: Packaging Material Policy
text: All consumer packaging must be at least 70% recyclable. Non-recyclable plastic films are prohibited on retail products sold after 2025. Paper and cardboard must carry the FSC certification mark.

title: Labeling Requirements
text: Every product package must display: product name, net weight in metric units, manufacturer name and address, expiry date, and a scannable barcode. Nutritional labels are mandatory for food items.

title: Recycling Symbol Rules
text: The recycling triangle with a resin identification code (1-7) must be printed on all plastic components. A missing or unreadable recycling symbol makes the packaging non-compliant.

title: Language and Localization
text: Products sold in Indonesia must show all mandatory information in Bahasa Indonesia. English-only labels are not compliant for regulated categories such as food, cosmetics, and pharmaceuticals.

title: Hazard and Safety Marks
text: Products containing flammable or corrosive substances must display the corresponding GHS hazard pictogram and a safety warning. Absence of a required hazard mark is a critical compliance failure.
